requirement_topic.en: Energy-Efficiency Labelling for Lighting Products (Jordan JSMO label scheme)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明产品能效标签（约旦 JSMO 标签方案）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明產品能效標籤（約旦 JSMO 標籤方案）

summary.en: Jordan operates a mandatory energy-efficiency labelling scheme administered by JSMO (Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization) for regulated energy-using products, including lighting. Lighting products placed on the Jordanian market are required to carry an energy-efficiency label and to meet the minimum performance tier of the applicable JS energy-efficiency standard, which is typically built on GSO/IEC efficiency methods (luminous efficacy in lm/W). The label and conformity certificate are verified by JSMO or its designated conformity bodies before the in-country importer clears the goods (port of entry typically Aqaba). Unlike the EU Ecodesign Regulation, Jordan does not enforce an EU-style binding minimum-efficacy regulation with separate CRI, lifetime, and power-factor minimums as a single horizontal instrument; the principal mandatory lever for energy performance is the energy-label scheme plus the applicable JS lighting standard. Confirm the current JS energy-efficiency standard reference and tier thresholds with JSMO for the specific lamp/luminaire type.
summary.zh: 约旦实行由 JSMO（约旦标准与计量组织）管理的强制性能效标签方案，涵盖照明等受管制用能产品。投放约旦市场的照明产品须贴附能效标签，并满足适用 JS 能效标准的最低性能档位，该标准通常以 GSO/IEC 能效方法（以 lm/W 计的光效）为基础。标签及合格证书由 JSMO 或其指定合格评定机构在在地进口商清关前核验（入境口岸通常为亚喀巴）。与欧盟生态设计法规不同，约旦未以单一横向制度形式强制实施欧盟式具约束力的最低能效法规及独立的显色指数、寿命、功率因数最低值；能效表现的主要强制手段为能效标签方案加适用 JS 照明标准。请就具体灯/灯具类型向 JSMO 核实现行 JS 能效标准引用及档位阈值。
summary.zht: 約旦實行由 JSMO（約旦標準與計量組織）管理的強制性能效標籤方案，涵蓋照明等受管制用能產品。投放約旦市場的照明產品須貼附能效標籤，並滿足適用 JS 能效標準的最低性能檔位，該標準通常以 GSO/IEC 能效方法（以 lm/W 計的光效）為基礎。標籤及合格證書由 JSMO 或其指定合格評定機構在在地進口商清關前核驗（入境口岸通常為亞喀巴）。與歐盟生態設計法規不同，約旦未以單一橫向制度形式強制實施歐盟式具約束力的最低能效法規及獨立的顯色指數、壽命、功率因數最低值；能效表現的主要強制手段為能效標籤方案加適用 JS 照明標準。請就具體燈/燈具類型向 JSMO 核實現行 JS 能效標準引用及檔位閾值。

standards_or_laws: JSMO energy-efficiency labelling scheme for lighting products (Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization)
Applicable JS energy-efficiency standard for lamps/luminaires (adopting GSO/IEC efficiency methods, lm/W)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 （Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires）, which defines three energy-efficiency grades: Grade 1 ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum for CN market entry. The China Energy Label （CEL） registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR. GB 30255 sets absolute lm/W thresholds and does not comprehensively cover CRI, lifetime, or power-factor minimums in a single binding instrument.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级 ≥90 lm/W；2 级 ≥80 lm/W；3 级 ≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 设定绝对 lm/W 阈值，未在单一约束性制度中全面涵盖显色指数、寿命或功率因数最低值。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級 ≥90 lm/W；2 級 ≥80 lm/W；3 級 ≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 設定絕對 lm/W 閾值，未在單一約束性制度中全面涵蓋顯色指數、壽命或功率因數最低值。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: Both Jordan and China require an energy label and a minimum efficiency tier, so a Chinese product already carrying the CEL is conceptually close — but the schemes are non-mutual: the Jordanian label and conformity certificate must be obtained separately through JSMO, and the CN CEL grade does not transfer. The Jordanian label class is derived from the applicable JS/GSO efficiency method, which may set thresholds and a label layout different from the CN absolute-grade scheme; verify the current JS tier for the specific product. Jordan does not impose the EU-style horizontal minimum-CRI, minimum-lifetime, and minimum-power-factor bundle, so the gap versus Jordan is narrower than versus the EU — the principal extra steps are obtaining the JSMO energy label and the JSMO conformity certificate, and routing through a registered in-country importer.
gap.zh: 约旦与中国均要求能效标签及最低能效档位，因此已贴附 CEL 的中国产品在概念上较为接近——但两套方案不互认：约旦标签及合格证书须经 JSMO 单独取得，中国 CEL 等级不可转移。约旦标签等级依适用 JS/GSO 能效方法得出，其阈值及标签版式可能与中国绝对等级方案不同；请就具体产品核实现行 JS 档位。约旦不强制欧盟式横向最低显色指数、最低寿命、最低功率因数组合，因此对约旦的差距小于对欧盟——主要额外步骤为取得 JSMO 能效标签及 JSMO 合格证书，并通过在地注册进口商清关。
gap.zht: 約旦與中國均要求能效標籤及最低能效檔位，因此已貼附 CEL 的中國產品在概念上較為接近——但兩套方案不互認：約旦標籤及合格證書須經 JSMO 單獨取得，中國 CEL 等級不可轉移。約旦標籤等級依適用 JS/GSO 能效方法得出，其閾值及標籤版式可能與中國絕對等級方案不同；請就具體產品核實現行 JS 檔位。約旦不強制歐盟式橫向最低顯色指數、最低壽命、最低功率因數組合，因此對約旦的差距小於對歐盟——主要額外步驟為取得 JSMO 能效標籤及 JSMO 合格證書，並通過在地註冊進口商清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — energy-efficiency label and applicable JS minimum efficiency tier required for regulated lighting products placed on the Jordanian market; verified via JSMO conformity certificate before importer clears the goods
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Jordan requires an energy-efficiency label and compliance with the applicable JS efficiency tier for regulated lighting, verified through a JSMO conformity certificate. Unlike the EU, Jordan does not enforce a horizontal ecodesign minimum-efficacy regulation bundling CRI, lifetime, and power factor — the energy-label scheme is the main mandatory lever. The CN China Energy Label does not transfer; the Jordanian label and certificate must be obtained separately via JSMO. Confirm the current JS efficiency standard reference and tier thresholds for the specific lamp/luminaire type before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 约旦对受管制照明要求能效标签并符合适用 JS 能效档位，经 JSMO 合格证书核验。与欧盟不同，约旦未强制实施捆绑显色指数、寿命及功率因数的横向生态设计最低能效法规——能效标签方案是主要强制手段。中国能效标识不可转移；约旦标签及证书须经 JSMO 单独取得。出货前请就具体灯/灯具类型核实现行 JS 能效标准引用及档位阈值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 約旦對受管制照明要求能效標籤並符合適用 JS 能效檔位，經 JSMO 合格證書核驗。與歐盟不同，約旦未強制實施捆綁顯色指數、壽命及功率因數的橫向生態設計最低能效法規——能效標籤方案是主要強制手段。中國能效標識不可轉移；約旦標籤及證書須經 JSMO 單獨取得。出貨前請就具體燈/燈具類型核實現行 JS 能效標準引用及檔位閾值。

requirement_topic.en: JSMO Conformity Certificate and In-Country Importer (Market-Access Process)
requirement_topic.zh: JSMO 合格证书与在地进口商（市场准入流程）
requirement_topic.zht: JSMO 合格證書與在地進口商（市場准入流程）

summary.en: Regulated products entering Jordan require a JSMO conformity certificate (verification of conformity against the applicable Jordanian technical regulation / JS standard) before customs clearance. Lighting products are typically regulated, so the importer must present test evidence against the applicable JS/IEC lighting standards (safety, energy label, and — for smart products — TRC radio approval) to JSMO or its designated conformity-assessment body. A registered in-country Jordanian importer is required as the legal entity placing the goods on the market; the foreign manufacturer cannot self-clear. Goods are commonly imported through the port of Aqaba. The Jordanian grid is 230 V, 50 Hz — products must be rated and tested for 230 V (50 Hz matches China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase). Confirm the exact certificate type, route (per-shipment vs registration/type approval), and designated conformity body with JSMO for the specific product.
summary.zh: 进入约旦的受管制产品在清关前须取得 JSMO 合格证书（依适用约旦技术法规/JS 标准的符合性核验）。照明产品通常受管制，故进口商须向 JSMO 或其指定合格评定机构提交针对适用 JS/IEC 照明标准的检测证据（安全、能效标签，智能产品另需 TRC 无线电核准）。须有在约旦注册的在地进口商作为投放市场的法律主体；境外制造商不可自行清关。货物通常经亚喀巴港进口。约旦电网为 230 V、50 Hz——产品须按 230 V 标定并检测（50 Hz 与中国相同，但标称电压与中国 220 V 单相/380 V 三相不同）。请就具体产品向 JSMO 核实确切证书类型、路径（逐批 vs 注册/型式核准）及指定合格评定机构。
summary.zht: 進入約旦的受管制產品在清關前須取得 JSMO 合格證書（依適用約旦技術法規/JS 標準的符合性核驗）。照明產品通常受管制，故進口商須向 JSMO 或其指定合格評定機構提交針對適用 JS/IEC 照明標準的檢測證據（安全、能效標籤，智能產品另需 TRC 無線電核准）。須有在約旦註冊的在地進口商作為投放市場的法律主體；境外製造商不可自行清關。貨物通常經亞喀巴港進口。約旦電網為 230 V、50 Hz——產品須按 230 V 標定並檢測（50 Hz 與中國相同，但標稱電壓與中國 220 V 單相/380 V 三相不同）。請就具體產品向 JSMO 核實確切證書類型、路徑（逐批 vs 註冊/型式核准）及指定合格評定機構。

standards_or_laws: JSMO conformity-assessment / conformity-certificate requirement for regulated products (Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization)
Registered in-country importer requirement (Jordanian market-placement entity)

summary.en: In China the corresponding market-access mechanism for residential luminaires is CCC （China Compulsory Certification）, administered by CNCA and certified by bodies such as CQC （China Quality Certification Centre）. CCC is a mandatory third-party type-certification process tied to GB standards. There is no requirement for a foreign in-country importer because the manufacturer or its domestic agent places the goods on the CN market directly. CCC certificates are issued against Chinese standards and are not recognised by JSMO for Jordanian market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，居民灯具的对应市场准入机制为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，并由 CQC（中国质量认证中心）等机构认证。CCC 是与 GB 标准挂钩的强制性第三方型式认证流程。无境外在地进口商要求，因制造商或其国内代理直接将货物投放中国市场。CCC 证书依中国标准签发，不被 JSMO 用于约旦市场准入所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，居民燈具的對應市場准入機制為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，並由 CQC（中國質量認證中心）等機構認證。CCC 是與 GB 標準掛鈎的強制性第三方型式認證流程。無境外在地進口商要求，因製造商或其國內代理直接將貨物投放中國市場。CCC 證書依中國標準簽發，不被 JSMO 用於約旦市場准入所認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — administered by CNCA

gap.en: Both markets use a mandatory conformity scheme, but they are non-mutual and structurally different: CN CCC is a domestic type-certification, while Jordan requires a JSMO conformity certificate (often per-shipment or registration-based) presented by a registered in-country Jordanian importer. CCC certificates and GB test reports are not accepted by JSMO; the manufacturer must supply test evidence against the applicable JS/IEC references and route the goods through a Jordanian importer. The product must also be rated for the 230 V, 50 Hz Jordanian grid — Chinese products built for 220 V should be confirmed as suitable for and tested at 230 V. Key extra steps versus CN: appoint/contract a registered Jordanian importer, obtain the JSMO conformity certificate, and confirm the certificate route (per-shipment vs registration) with JSMO.
gap.zh: 两地均采用强制合格评定制度，但不互认且结构不同：中国 CCC 为国内型式认证，而约旦要求由在约旦注册的在地进口商提交 JSMO 合格证书（常为逐批或基于注册）。JSMO 不接受 CCC 证书及 GB 检测报告；制造商须提交针对适用 JS/IEC 引用的检测证据，并通过约旦进口商清关。产品还须按约旦 230 V、50 Hz 电网标定——为 220 V 设计的中国产品应确认适用并按 230 V 检测。相对中国的主要额外步骤：委任/签约在约旦注册的进口商、取得 JSMO 合格证书，并向 JSMO 确认证书路径（逐批 vs 注册）。
gap.zht: 兩地均採用強制合格評定制度，但不互認且結構不同：中國 CCC 為國內型式認證，而約旦要求由在約旦註冊的在地進口商提交 JSMO 合格證書（常為逐批或基於註冊）。JSMO 不接受 CCC 證書及 GB 檢測報告；製造商須提交針對適用 JS/IEC 引用的檢測證據，並通過約旦進口商清關。產品還須按約旦 230 V、50 Hz 電網標定——為 220 V 設計的中國產品應確認適用並按 230 V 檢測。相對中國的主要額外步驟：委任/簽約在約旦註冊的進口商、取得 JSMO 合格證書，並向 JSMO 確認證書路徑（逐批 vs 註冊）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — JSMO conformity certificate required before customs clearance for regulated lighting products; a registered in-country Jordanian importer is required as the market-placement entity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; no foreign in-country importer requirement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Regulated lighting products entering Jordan require a JSMO conformity certificate before customs clearance, presented by a registered in-country Jordanian importer (port of entry typically Aqaba). CCC certificates and GB test reports are not accepted by JSMO — test evidence against the applicable JS/IEC references is needed. Products must be rated and tested for Jordan's 230 V, 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V). Confirm the exact certificate type and route with JSMO for the specific product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入约旦的受管制照明产品在清关前须取得 JSMO 合格证书，由在约旦注册的在地进口商提交（入境口岸通常为亚喀巴）。JSMO 不接受 CCC 证书及 GB 检测报告——须提供针对适用 JS/IEC 引用的检测证据。产品须按约旦 230 V、50 Hz 电网标定并检测（50 Hz 与中国相同；标称电压与中国 220 V 不同）。请就具体产品向 JSMO 确认确切证书类型及路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入約旦的受管制照明產品在清關前須取得 JSMO 合格證書，由在約旦註冊的在地進口商提交（入境口岸通常為亞喀巴）。JSMO 不接受 CCC 證書及 GB 檢測報告——須提供針對適用 JS/IEC 引用的檢測證據。產品須按約旦 230 V、50 Hz 電網標定並檢測（50 Hz 與中國相同；標稱電壓與中國 220 V 不同）。請就具體產品向 JSMO 確認確切證書類型及路徑。
